SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Graham, pro per (Respondent/Plaintiff)
No Appearances by Appelant/Defendant

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Respondent in pro per is sworn.
Robert Graham testifies on his behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Document re money paid to doctor
Exhibit 2 - Document re money paid to ambulance
Exhibit 3 - List of costs

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Paul A. Renne, Clerk Maria Pena, Not Reported (414)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:49
Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Caused called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, John Calder does not appear. Respondent, Robert Graham appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Renne.

EXHR (1) Copy of Check
EXHR(2) Medical invoice
EXHR (3) invoice for process server

10:55am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
